languages.text: {n}Иждриг кружит вокруг вас, выискивая слабину в обороне, прежде чем нанести удар. Льющаяся из ран кровь совершенно его не беспокоит.{/n}
{n}Batoshski circles you, looking for a weakness in your defences before striking. He remains utterly indifferent to the blood flowing from his wounds.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Иждриг кружит вокруг вас, выискивая слабину в обороне, прежде чем нанести удар. Льющаяся из ран кровь совершенно его не беспокоит.{/n}

languages.text: {n}バトシュスキーはあなたの防御の弱点を探しながら、あなたを囲む。そして、必ず攻撃する。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski circles you, looking for a weakness in your defences before inevitably striking.{/n}

traits.locale_text: バトシュスキーはあなたの防御の弱点を探しながら、あなたを囲む。そして、必ず攻撃する。

languages.text: {n}Batoshski tourne autour de vous, cherchant une vulnérabilité dans vos défenses avant de frapper. Ses plaies béantes et sanguinolentes ne semblent pas l'affecter outre mesure.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski circles you, looking for a weakness in your defences before striking. He remains utterly indifferent to the blood flowing from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski tourne autour de vous, cherchant une vulnérabilité dans vos défenses avant de frapper. Ses plaies béantes et sanguinolentes ne semblent pas l'affecter outre mesure.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Batoshski etrafında dolanıyor, saldırmadan önce savunmanda zayıflık arıyor. Yaralarından akan kana karşı tamamen kayıtsız kalıyor.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski circles you, looking for a weakness in your defences before striking. He remains utterly indifferent to the blood flowing from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski etrafında dolanıyor, saldırmadan önce savunmanda zayıflık arıyor. Yaralarından akan kana karşı tamamen kayıtsız kalıyor.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Batoshski umkreist dich und sucht nach einer Schwäche in deiner Verteidigung, ehe er angreift. Er schenkt dem aus seinen Wunden strömenden Blut keinerlei Beachtung.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski circles you, looking for a weakness in your defences before striking. He remains utterly indifferent to the blood flowing from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski umkreist dich und sucht nach einer Schwäche in deiner Verteidigung, ehe er angreift. Er schenkt dem aus seinen Wunden strömenden Blut keinerlei Beachtung.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Batoshski te rodea en busca de un punto débil en tus defensas antes de lanzar su ataque. Permanece totalmente indiferente a la sangre que fluye de sus heridas.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski circles you, looking for a weakness in your defences before striking. He remains utterly indifferent to the blood flowing from his wounds.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Batoshski te rodea en busca de un punto débil en tus defensas antes de lanzar su ataque. Permanece totalmente indiferente a la sangre que fluye de sus heridas.{/n}

languages.text: {n}巴托什斯基对自己伤口不断流出的鲜血无动于衷。他绕着你转圈，寻找你防御中的破绽，蓄势待发。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Batoshski circles you, looking for a weakness in your defences before striking. He remains utterly indifferent to the blood flowing from his wounds.{/n}
